view_title: Column grid master for บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 5 -- derived from S-02 (แปลนฐานรากแผ่) and S-03 (แปลนฐานรากเสาเข็ม), cross-confirmed identical between both sheets; dummy grid ground-floor-only extension seen on S-04/S-05

y_lines.note: Ground-floor-only extension south of grid A (real beams B1/B2 shown on S-04's floor-1 beam plan, spanning grid1-grid2, ~2.05m south of grid A). Floor-2 beam plan (S-05) shows only a small 0.40m overhang at the same edge, NOT a full structural bay. RESOLVED (2026-07-13): mechanical sheet M-01 (หน้า65, ตำแหน่งติดตั้งพัดลมระบายอากาศ ชั้นที่ 1) confirms this area is 'จอดรถ' (parking/carport), a single-story open structure at grade '±0.00', with 'เฉลียง' (terrace) and 'ทางเดิน' (walkway) as transition zones -- consistent with a carport not needing a matching footing/pile line on S-02/S-03, and explaining why S-04/S-05/S-06 each show different dimensions for this zone (different features of the same non-primary structure, not a data conflict).

warnings: Footing plans (S-02/S-03) show a clean rectangular 4x6 grid with NO dummy grid needed for foundations -- the dummy grid 'gridAprime' found on S-04/S-05 is a ground-floor beam-level feature only (a carport/terrace slab with real beams, not a footing-bearing column line), consistent with an open/unsupported slab-on-grade extension rather than a full structural bay needing its own foundation.

Footing plan shows an irregular (non-full-rectangular) footprint: no footing at grid1-gridF, grid3-gridA/B/F, or grid3-gridB -- building footprint is not a simple rectangle, consistent with an L-shaped or notched floor plan typical of these house designs.

This house (บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 5, drawing no. S58136) is significantly larger than houses #2-#4 in floor area (224 sqm per house #4's price-reference table read on หน้า93) -- 13.40m x 9.00m overall footprint here vs house #4's smaller grid, consistent with the larger size.
The 0.60m/0.50m dimensions beyond grid1/grid4 seen on both S-04 and S-05's top dimension chains are eave/slab-edge overhangs (no beam drawn beyond those points), not additional dummy grid lines.
